description_long: This is a large, clear plastic bottle filled with a dark liquid, featuring a bright red screw cap and a prominent red label wrapped around its midsection. The label displays the iconic Coca-Cola branding in white script, with additional product information and barcodes visible on the reverse side. The bottle has a classic contoured shape, with a slightly tapered neck and a wider, rounded base that includes four distinct feet for stability. The plastic body is smooth and glossy, allowing partial visibility of the liquid inside. The cap is small, circular, and ribbed for grip, matching the red color of the label. There are no visible signs of damage, and the bottle appears clean and intact.
description: A large, clear plastic Coca-Cola bottle with a red screw cap and a red branded label, filled with dark liquid. The bottle has a contoured shape and a glossy, smooth surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Coca-Cola logo in white script on a red label, with the red cap and dark liquid visible.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the back of the label with product information, barcodes, and the red cap.
description_view_2: Similar to the front, this view again highlights the Coca-Cola logo and the bottle's contoured shape.
description_view_3: Another rear-side view, showing more of the label's text and barcode details.
attribute_label_or_branding: Red label with white Coca-Cola script logo, white wave design, and additional product information and barcodes on the back. The branding is bold and centrally placed.
